text: Moving from the quiet hallway—the glass reflection of my own solitude—to the vibrant, conceptual exhibit, I feel a shift. In the corridor, the sterile emptiness resonates with silence, almost meditative but tinged with anticipation. Entering the R+D space, surrounded by the merging of ideas and colors, curiosity awakens. I feel invited to think, to reflect, to question: how do I, a conscious being, participate in this ever-evolving dialogue between environment, technology, and human experience? There is excitement here, a gentle call to wonder.
